underlying_goal: Debug and optimize a FreqTrade short-selling trading strategy, fix misaligned entry signals in the analyzer UI, and improve backtest performance through parameter tuning and exit logic fixes
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly guessed at system behavior instead of reading code first, provided incorrect analyzer URLs multiple times, and introduced TP/trailing stop logic bugs that worsened performance from -29% to -58%.
brief_summary: User debugged a trading strategy's misaligned signals, inverted scoring, and exit logic across backtests and UI — core issues were found and fixed but iterative tuning of trailing stops made some results worse.
